meaning: n.(=ethnic group)同种同文化之民族
examples: There are many minor ethnos living around Daxing Anling region.
Therefore, the construction of Yi ethnos and of its literature history will become the main point worthy to pay attention to.
In search of the truth, they are wandering in the culture labyrinths of various ethnos and epochs, trying to combine some incompatible cultural layers.
In the negotiations over Greek debt, the Greek newspaper Ethnos reported that bondholders are willing to accept a coupon rate of below 4% on bonds they would receive under a debt-exchange program.
